name: Satismeter NPS and In-App Survey API
what_it_does: NPS and in-app customer survey platform with REST API — enabling SaaS and product teams to collect Net Promoter Score and CSAT feedback from customers via targeted in-app surveys, email campaigns, and website widgets, with customer segmentation, behavioral triggers, and integration with analytics and CRM tools.
use_cases: Triggering NPS surveys via Satismeter API for specific customer milestones
Collecting in-app feedback via Satismeter JavaScript SDK for product experience feedback
Syncing NPS scores via Satismeter API to CRM for customer health monitoring
Managing survey campaigns via Satismeter API for automated feedback collection
Retrieving survey responses via Satismeter API for analytics dashboard integration
not_for: General market research surveys (use SurveyMonkey or Typeform for broad surveys)
Enterprise-scale customer experience management (use Medallia or Qualtrics for enterprise)
B2B sales feedback (Satismeter is product/post-sale customer success focused)
best_when: A product team or customer success team at a SaaS company needs automated NPS/CSAT collection via in-app surveys — where Satismeter's behavioral triggers and JavaScript SDK enable contextual feedback without manual email campaigns.
avoid_when: You need general market research, enterprise CX management, or physical product feedback (not SaaS in-app).

auth.notes: API key via Authorization: Bearer header. Write key (for JavaScript SDK, public) and read key (for REST API, server-side). No OAuth2. No fine-grained scopes. Webhooks for survey response events. JavaScript SDK for in-app survey display. REST API for response retrieval and user management.

pricing.paid_tiers: Starter $49/month (unlimited users, 200 responses); Growth $99/month (1,000 responses); Scale $199/month (5,000 responses)
pricing.notes: Czech company (Prague, Czechia). Founded 2014. Bootstrapped. SaaS-focused NPS tool. 800+ customers. Integrations: Segment, Intercom, HubSpot, Slack, Mixpanel, Amplitude, Salesforce, Zapier. In-app surveys with behavioral targeting (user properties, events). Email NPS via SendGrid/Mandrill integration. Response rate analytics. Follow-up question templates. GDPR compliant (Czech/EU company). Acquired by Hotjar? (unconfirmed in sources — check current ownership).

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API with Bearer token. JS SDK for in-app surveys. Webhooks. GDPR. Czech company (EU). Free plan (25 responses/month). Two key types (write=public, read=server). Good integration ecosystem.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Response reads idempotent by response ID. User reads idempotent by user ID. Survey triggers: check if user already received survey. Webhook delivery at-least-once — implement idempotent handlers.
known_agent_gotchas: Two key types: write key (public, for JS SDK in-app display) vs read key (server, for REST API reads)
In-app survey: JS SDK required for in-app display — pure REST API doesn't show surveys
User properties must be synced before behavioral targeting works — send user traits first
Free plan: 25 responses/month — very limited for production use
Czech company — GDPR by default, EU data residency
Webhook events for responses — implement idempotent handlers (may retry)

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. Czech company (EU). Write key (public) vs read key (server-side) separation. No OAuth2 scope granularity. EU data residency. Customer feedback data (NPS scores, comments) is PII. Webhook signature validation.
